name: graveyard-plugin
description: Marketplace for the Graveyard plugin: archive old GitHub repos as restorable git bundles, then safely delete the originals.

plugins.name: graveyard
plugins.description: Archive old GitHub repositories into a single private graveyard repo as restorable git bundles, then safely delete the originals. Captures full history (branches, tags, PR refs) and never deletes an original until its backup is verified.
